\tzpentry{ID4197}{Helical Holonomy Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4197 introduces Helical Holonomy Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} W_{\text{helical}} = \frac{1}{2\pi} \oint_{\mathcal{C}} d\Phi_{\text{Parker}} = \frac{r - r_0}{2\pi v_{sw}/\Omega_{\odot}} \end{equation}
